idea-plugin.name: Messaging Channel Visualizer
idea-plugin.description:
Visualizes messaging broker channel configurations defined in application.properties files.

Supports:

  • Quarkus — MicroProfile Reactive Messaging (AMQP, Kafka, RabbitMQ)
  • Spring Cloud Stream — Kafka and RabbitMQ bindings
  • Spring Kafka — Native consumer/producer/listener configuration
  • Spring RabbitMQ — Native listener configuration

Features:

  • Incoming and outgoing channels displayed in a sortable, color-coded table
  • Profile-aware parsing (e.g. %dev., %prod.)
  • In-table editing — changes are written back to the properties file automatically
  • Live refresh on file save and while typing
  • Detail panel showing all raw properties for a selected channel
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0
  • Initial release
  • Parse and visualize Quarkus, Spring Cloud Stream, Spring Kafka, and Spring RabbitMQ channels
  • Color-coded incoming/outgoing direction indicators
  • In-table editing with automatic write-back to application.properties
  • Live refresh on file changes and keystrokes
  • Profile prefix support
